title: Who I Am
description: I am a full stack engineer with a systems mindset. I enjoy turning ambiguous ideas into clear plans, then shipping dependable software with teams that care about quality.

title: How I Work
description: I focus on practical architecture, observable systems, and clear communication. My goal is to make delivery predictable without slowing teams down.

title: Selected Work Snapshot
description: Recent work includes enterprise automation platforms, modern React/Angular interfaces, scalable APIs, and cloud deployment pipelines used by cross-functional teams.

title: Open To New Mission
description: I am open to senior and lead full stack roles where I can own architecture, help teams execute, and deliver products people trust. Reach out if that matches your team.
